name_en: M30258 Monogram Black (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized! Brazza Wallet. This Brazza wallet is from Louis Vuitton's earliest men's series—the Taïga leather collection. It is a practical design with multiple pockets, compartments, and dividers. A silver LV initial adds a subtle and elegant brand touch to the design. 10 x 19 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).
